completion_scope: Option A topology applied; host 127.0.0.1:55432 reachable; migration 001 from authorized migrations_backup applied partial private-schema/functions only; migration 002 failed because schema platform is absent; T054 incomplete

source_result.compose_change: added foundation_edge to postgres.networks; foundation_data.internal remained true

failure.assessment: Option A succeeded: Postgres is on foundation_edge and foundation_data, data network remains internal, and 127.0.0.1:55432 is reachable. Re-apply used the previously authorized migrations_backup bytes. Migration 001 committed only platform_private helpers and does not create schema platform, roles, or the migration ledger. Migration 002 therefore fails closed. A larger root-level 001 backup candidate exists but was not substituted because it was outside the authorized migrations_backup restore set and does not match historical t039 evidence hash.
failure.recovery: Preserve volumes, role, disposable DB, Option A topology, and partial platform_private objects. Obtain an exact HCP-03/HCP-04 amendment authorizing (1) replacement of supabase/migrations/*.sql with complete reviewed sources (either recovered evidence-hash matches or an explicitly approved alternate such as the root 001 backup plus matching 002/003), (2) a guarded forward-recovery cleanup of the partial platform_private objects if required, then (3) re-apply 001-003, attest, and finish T054 gates.

result.next_required_action: Exact HCP-03/HCP-04 amendment to replace incomplete restored migration sources and recover partial apply state
